40.1.2.6 - Nasopharyngeal and Tracheostomy Aspiration 
(Rev. 1, 10-01-03) 
A3-4118.1.B.6, HHA-205.1.B.6 

Nasopharyngeal and tracheostomy aspiration are skilled nursing services and, if required 
to treat the patient's illness or injury, would be covered as skilled nursing services.
